title: Sara writes a letter to the Tooth Fairy
prompt: @Sara sits at the kitchen table, a pink CRAYON pinched in right fingers, drawing carefully on a sheet of paper. The tongue POKES out the side of the mouth in concentration. @Eva leans on the table beside, both elbows down, chin in palms, eyes WATCHING the paper. The paper shows a child-drawn fairy with wings and a wand. The crayon ADDS sparkly dots around the fairy. The younger girl POINTS to the paper, mouth OPENS adding an idea. Warm morning kitchen daylight. @Sara (focused): "Dear Tooth Fairy..."
